title: PlayerCurrency
description: A Handy Multi-Currency Plugin for Players
body:
![Core Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Core%20Support-Spigot|Folia-blue)
![Version Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version%20Support-1.7.x--26.x-blue)
![Paid](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid-No-blue)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.PlayerCurrency&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

### 1. Introduction

> PlayerCurrency – A quite useful multi-currency plugin for players

1. Supports **MySQL** and local **SQLite** storage  
2. Allows creating <font color=red>multiple currencies with descriptions</font>  
3. Supports <font color=red>placeholder</font> parsing  
4. <font color=red>Logs</font> every <font color=red>balance change</font> for tracking and rollback  
5. Supports importing NyEconomy's MySQL data (1.0.1+)  
6. Supports importing PlayerPoints data (1.0.5+)  
7. Automatically records cumulative values for each currency type (1.0.6+)  
8. Supports importing Vault data (1.0.7+)  
9. Allows linking specific currencies to Vault (1.0.7+)  
10. Comprehensive API for easy third-party integration  

### 2. Plugin Dependencies

**All optional**  

PlaceholderAPI PAPI Placeholders  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/6245/)
